title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SFP28-LR
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP28
description: The UACC-OM-SFP28-LR is an optical module that operates at speeds up to 25 Gbps . It operates in Single-mode and guarantees a range of up to 10 km Transfer speed up to 25 Gb/s Range up to 10 km Single-mode
